npcs.name: Gundren Rockseeker
npcs.description: The dwarf who hired the party. Discovered a map to Wave Echo Cave, the lost mine of the Phandelver's Pact, with his brothers Nundro and Tharden. Captured by the Black Spider and taken to Cragmaw Castle. Knows more about the mine than he let on.

npcs.name: Sildar Hallwinter
npcs.description: Gundren's escort. Member of the Lords' Alliance. Captured by Cragmaw goblins. Wants to find the missing Lords' Alliance agent Iarno Albrek — who is secretly Glasstaff. Will serve as a contact in Phandalin if rescued.

npcs.name: Iarno Albrek (Glasstaff)
npcs.role: Renegade wizard — leader of the Redbrand Ruffians
npcs.description: Former Lords' Alliance agent gone rogue. Known as Glasstaff to his men. Runs the Redbrand Ruffians from Tresendar Manor. Secretly working with the Black Spider. Carries a glass staff. Cowardly when cornered — may flee.

npcs.name: Nezznar (The Black Spider)
npcs.description: A drow who seeks the secrets of Wave Echo Cave and the Forge of Spells. Orchestrated Gundren's kidnapping. Commands the Cragmaw goblins and the Redbrand Ruffians through intermediaries. Ultimately wants to control the mine's magical forge.

npcs.name: Ruxithid the Chosen
npcs.description: A goblin transformed and elevated by illithid influence. Commands the Sawplee goblin tribe from Zorzula's Rest. The mind flayers speak through him. Central threat of the Shattered Obelisk chapters.

npcs.name: Toblen Stonehill
npcs.description: Runs the Stonehill Inn in Phandalin. Good source of local gossip and rumors. Nervous about the Redbrand Ruffians. Will share what he knows if the party seems trustworthy.

npcs.name: Halia Thornton
npcs.description: Runs the Miners' Exchange. Ambitious and calculating. Secretly wants the Redbrand Ruffians eliminated so she can extend her own influence. Will pay for Glasstaff's correspondence but keep his fate quiet. Not to be fully trusted.

npcs.name: Daran Edermath
npcs.role: Retired adventurer — Order of the Gauntlet
npcs.description: Retired half-elf adventurer living in a cottage with an apple orchard. Member of the Order of the Gauntlet. Concerned about undead activity at Old Owl Well. Good source of quests and honest information.

npcs.name: Qelline Alderleaf
npcs.description: Halfling farmer whose son Carp has discovered a secret tunnel into Tresendar Manor. Member of the Emerald Enclave. Can point the party toward Reidoth the Druid in Thundertree.

npcs.name: Sister Garaele
npcs.description: Tends the Shrine of Luck in Phandalin. Secretly a Harper agent. Needs the party's help to get information from a banshee named Agatha about a spellbook. Will reward with three potions of healing.

npcs.name: Harbin Wester
npcs.description: The elected townmaster. Timid and ineffective — has been avoiding confrontation with the Redbrand Ruffians out of fear. Will post bounties but won't act himself. Not a villain, just a coward.

npcs.name: Reidoth the Druid
npcs.description: An old druid living among the ruins of Thundertree. Knows the locations of Cragmaw Castle and Wave Echo Cave. Will share the information in exchange for help dealing with a young green dragon named Venomfang.

npcs.name: Gwyn Oresong
npcs.description: A visiting dwarven sage who can help the party track the mind flayer obelisk fragments. Becomes a key resource in the later chapters of the adventure.
